name: Strawberry-Lemon Cream Parfaits
recipeIngredient: 1 pint ripe strawberries, hulled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Have ready 4 parfait or wine glasses, each with at least 1-cup capacity.
2. Mix sugar and cornstarch in a small saucepan.
3. Whisk in milk until smooth.
4. Whisk over medium heat until boiling.
5. Continue whisking and boiling until thick as paste, about 1-2 minutes. Remove from heat.
6. Pour egg substitute into a 2-cup glass measure.
7. Whisk in one-third the hot milk mixture, then pour it back into the saucepan.
8. Do not return to heat; whisk until smooth and thick as pudding.
9. Whisk in lemon peel and juice. Cover surface directly with plastic wrap to keep a skin from forming. Refrigerate for 1/2 hour.
10. Stir in sour cream.
11. Fill glasses, alternating lemon cream and strawberries. Cover and chill for at least 1 1/2 hours or up to 12 hours.
